hasAttributes.name: FH_AccountId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: statecode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the FH Account.

hasAttributes.name: statuscode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the FH Account.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Required name field.

hasAttributes.name: accountingClassification
hasAttributes.description: Indicates whether the financial holding is an asset or a liability.

hasAttributes.name: availableBalance
hasAttributes.description: Available balance on the account.

hasAttributes.name: availablebalance_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the available balance in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: availableBalance_default
hasAttributes.description: Available balance converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: averageBalance
hasAttributes.description: The average balance in the account calculated over a chosen period of time by the bank.

hasAttributes.name: averagebalance_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the average balance in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: averageBalance_default
hasAttributes.description: Average balance converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: balance
hasAttributes.description: The balance or value of the financial holding in the original currency of the financial holding.

hasAttributes.name: balance_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the balance in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: balanceDefault
hasAttributes.description: Balance converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: balanceExchangerate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate between the transaction currency of the financial holding and the default currency (1 unit of transaction currency = X units of default currency).

hasAttributes.name: blockedAmount
hasAttributes.description: The amount of the account's balance that has been blocked/reserved by the bank for a specific purpose or as a security measure.

hasAttributes.name: blockedamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the blocked amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: blockedAmount_default
hasAttributes.description: Blocked amount converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: dateoflasttransaction
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the last transaction on the account was made.

hasAttributes.name: delinquencyStatus
hasAttributes.description: Indication of whether the customer's loan is delinquent or not (that is, whether any payments are overdue).

hasAttributes.name: financialHoldingCategory
hasAttributes.description: The category of the financial holding (Accounts, Long-term savings, Investments, Loans and Lines or credit).

hasAttributes.name: financialHoldingType
hasAttributes.description: Type of financial account (checking, savings, other).

hasAttributes.name: integrationKey
hasAttributes.description: Used by the system integrator to uniquely define the data record .

hasAttributes.name: interestrate
hasAttributes.description: The rate of interest applied to the financial holding, to be earned during a defined period/term.

hasAttributes.name: interestType
hasAttributes.description: The type of interest applied to the loan: fixed, periodical, floating, etc.

hasAttributes.name: numberoftransactions
hasAttributes.description: Number of transactions that occurred in the last month.

hasAttributes.name: unclearedBalance
hasAttributes.description: The amount of money in pending transactions which have not yet been credited to the account, such as deposited checks that have not yet cleared.

hasAttributes.name: unclearedbalance_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the uncleared balance in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: unclearedBalance_default
hasAttributes.description: Uncleared balance converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: balanceDisplayValue
hasAttributes.description: Display value shows the balance of a financial holding in accordance with the type of the financial holding. Financial holdings that are typically defined as a customer's liabilities (such as lines of credit and loans) are presented as positive when the customer owes money to the financial institution (that is, a loan with an accounting value of -500 will appear as 500). In the inverse case: the display value will be negative for debit balances on a credit financial holding (such as overpayment of a credit card), or overdrawn account.

hasAttributes.name: balancedisplayvalue_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the balance display value in base currency.

definitions.description: A deposit account holding that allows the holder to make deposits and withdrawals through financial holding instruments. An account can be interest bearing
